tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local assessment, state aids and credits

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023: Enacted Child Tax Credit ($1,750/child), expanded Working Family Credit, added free school meals funding

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local assessment, state equalization

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023: Reduced second bracket from 4.4% to 4.4% (no change in recent sessions despite proposals)

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local assessment, state equalization

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023-2026: Phased conversion from graduated (top rate 8.98%) to flat 3.9%. Completed January 2026.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County boards of assessors, state equalization

key_facts.recent_changes: 2025: Flat rate reduced from 5.39% to 5.19%. Scheduled reductions continue with 4.99% floor via revenue triggers.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state oversight

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023: Flat rate of 2.5% took effect, down from graduated structure with 4.5% top rate.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state Tax Commission equalizes

key_facts.recent_changes: 2025: Flat rate reduced from 5.695% to 5.3% (HB 40). Third consecutive annual cut since converting from graduated rates in 2023.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County property valuation administrators, state oversight

key_facts.recent_changes: 2024: Rate triggered down from 4.0% to 3.5% after meeting revenue benchmarks. Originally flat at 5.0% in 2018.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state Tax Commission equalizes

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023-2026: Phased elimination of income tax on first $10,000, moving toward flat 4.0% with trigger to reach 0%.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state Department of Revenue equalizes

key_facts.recent_changes: 2024: Converted from graduated (top rate 6.75%) to flat 5.9%.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state oversight

key_facts.recent_changes: 2014-2026: Ongoing rate reductions from original 5.8% flat rate. Corporate rate declining to 0% by 2030 under current triggers.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, Prop 13 limits assessment increases to 2%/year

key_facts.recent_changes: 2024: Mental Health Services Tax extended (additional 1% on income over $1M). CalEITC expanded.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County appraisal districts, state Comptroller equalizes

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023: $18 billion property tax relief package. Franchise tax threshold raised. No income tax — constitutional prohibition (1993).

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County property appraisers, Save Our Homes assessment cap (3%/year)

key_facts.recent_changes: 2024: Homestead exemption increased. Corporate tax rate held at 5.5% (was temporarily 3.535% during COVID reductions).

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local assessors, state equalization rates
notable_credits: Earned Income Tax Credit (30% of federal)

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023: Top rate of 10.9% extended through 2027. PTET expanded.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Township assessors (Cook County) / County supervisors of assessments, state equalization
notable_credits: Earned Income Tax Credit (state, 20% of federal)

key_facts.recent_changes: 2020: Graduated tax ballot measure failed (Fair Tax Amendment). Flat rate of 4.95% remains.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state Board of Equalization

key_facts.recent_changes: 2021: Hall Tax (on interest and dividends) fully phased out, completing elimination begun in 2016.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County auditors, state Tax Commissioner equalizes

key_facts.recent_changes: 2024: Simplified to effective flat 3.5% on income above $26,050. Zero rate below threshold. CAT retained for businesses.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state Department of Local Government Finance
notable_credits: Earned Income Tax Credit (state, 10% of federal)
Unified Tax Credit for the Elderly

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023-2027: Rate reducing from 3.23% to 2.9% in scheduled steps. Currently at 3.05%.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state Department of Revenue equalizes

key_facts.recent_changes: 2021: 7% capital gains tax enacted on gains over $250K. Upheld by state Supreme Court 2023. Rate increased to 9.9% in 2025.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local tax assessors, county boards of taxation
notable_credits: Earned Income Tax Credit (state, 40% of federal)

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023: ANCHOR property tax relief expanded. Corporate surcharge of 2.5% on income over $1M extended.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, Measure 50 limits assessed value growth
notable_credits: Working Family Household and Dependent Care Credit

key_facts.recent_changes: 2023: Corporate Activity Tax retained. Kicker refund issued ($5.6 billion). No structural changes.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors, state Tax Commission oversight

key_facts.recent_changes: 2015: Commerce Tax enacted. No income tax — state constitution requires 2/3 legislative vote to enact.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County-administered; among the lowest effective rates in the US (~0.36%). State oversight by Alabama Department of Revenue.
notable_credits: Federal income tax deduction (unique among states)

key_facts.recent_changes: Grocery sales tax reduced from 3% to 2% (Sept 2025). PTET election simplified for 2025. Act 2025-280 standardized county/municipal sales tax exemption process.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local municipalities and boroughs. No statewide property tax. Not all areas levy property tax.

key_facts.recent_changes: No major individual tax changes (no individual income tax). Corporate tax brackets unchanged since 1994. PFD set at $1,000 for 2024-2025.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County-administered. Property assessed at 20% of market value. State Assessment Coordination Division provides oversight.

key_facts.recent_changes: Top individual rate reduced from 4.4% to 3.9% effective Jan 1, 2025. Top corporate rate reduced to 4.3%. Grocery state sales tax eliminated effective Jan 1, 2026.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: 64 county assessors. Residential property assessed at 6.7% of actual value. State Property Tax Administrator provides oversight and equalization.

key_facts.recent_changes: Flat rate returned to 4.4% for 2025 (was temporarily 4.25% in 2024 due to TABOR surplus refund). Proposition 121 (2022) permanently set statutory rate at 4.4%.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: 169 municipalities. Property assessed at 70% of fair market value. Among the highest effective property tax rates in the US.
notable_credits: State EITC (40% of federal + $250 for families with children)

key_facts.recent_changes: PTET made elective (was mandatory) starting 2024. Bottom two marginal rates reduced. 10% corporate surcharge extended through 2028. Estate tax exemption increased to $13.99M.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County-administered (3 counties). Relatively low effective rates (~0.48%). Gross receipts tax on businesses serves as partial substitute for sales tax.

key_facts.recent_changes: Selectively decoupled from OBBBA provisions: Section 174 R&E and full bonus depreciation retroactivity. Decoupling sunsets 2030. No PTET enacted (one of five income-tax states without one).

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: DC Office of Tax and Revenue. Residential rate $0.85 per $100 assessed value. Commercial $1.65 per $100. Assessed annually at 100% market value.
notable_credits: Schedule H Homeowner/Renter Property Tax Credit

key_facts.recent_changes: Sales tax increased from 6% to 6.5% (Oct 2025), rising to 7% (Oct 2026). Switching from Joyce to Finnigan method for combined reporting. Estate tax exemption indexed to $4,873,200.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County-administered. Each county sets own rates and classifications. Assessed at 100% market value.

key_facts.recent_changes: 2024 Act 46 (Green Affordability Plan II): Widened all 12 income tax brackets effective 2025; doubled standard deduction. Act 50 reduced PTET rate from 11% to 9%.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County appraisers assess at market value; state equalizes. Classified system: residential at 11.5%, commercial/industrial at 25%.

key_facts.recent_changes: 2024 SB 1: Consolidated 3 brackets to 2, reduced top rate from 5.7% to 5.58%, increased personal exemption. Social Security fully exempt. Single sales factor apportionment starting 2027.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Parish assessors value property; Tax Commission equalizes. Assessed at 10% of fair market value for residential, 15% for other.

key_facts.recent_changes: 2024 special session: Complete tax overhaul effective 2025. Replaced graduated tax (up to 4.25%) with flat 3%. Corporate flattened to 5.5%. Sales tax raised from 4.45% to 5%. Franchise tax repealed effective 2026.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local assessors value at full and fair cash value. Proposition 2-1/2 limits levy growth to 2.5% annually.

key_facts.recent_changes: 4% surtax on income over $1M (inflation-adjusted to $1,083,150 for 2025) via 2022 Fair Share Amendment. Revenue (~$2.6B/year) funds education and transportation.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: State Department of Assessments and Taxation assesses all real property; triennial reassessment cycle with phase-in. Local jurisdictions set rates.

key_facts.recent_changes: 2025: Added two new top brackets (6.25% and 6.50%). New 2% capital gains surcharge for AGI over $350,000. PTET expanded for resident owners. Local income taxes add 2.25%-3.20%.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Municipal assessors value property; State Property Tax Division provides oversight and equalization.
notable_credits: EITC (50% of federal for childless workers)
Child tax credit (doubled for under-6 in 2025)

key_facts.recent_changes: 2025: Bracket thresholds increased. Child tax credit doubled for children under 6. PTET bill (LD 191) introduced but not yet enacted.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local assessors value property; State Tax Commission oversees. Assessed at 50% of true cash value; Proposal A caps taxable value increases.

key_facts.recent_changes: Rate remains at 4.25% (no reduction triggered). FTE tax election deadline extended. Decoupled from OBBBA provisions. Temporary tipped/overtime income deductions enacted for 2026-2028.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors. Reassessment every two years. Classified system with different assessment ratios.

key_facts.recent_changes: Top rate reduced from 4.8% to 4.7% in 2025 via revenue trigger (SB 3). 100% capital gains exclusion new for 2025.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors. State Property Tax Administrator provides oversight. Property assessed at actual value.

key_facts.recent_changes: Rates cut significantly under LB 754 phasedown (was 6.84% top rate in 2022). Corporate flat 5.2%. Inheritance tax reformed ($100K close-relative exemption at 1%).

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local municipal assessors. No statewide property tax. Among the highest effective property tax rates in the nation (~1.86%).

key_facts.recent_changes: Interest & Dividends tax fully repealed Jan 1, 2025. NH is now a true no-income-tax state. Business Profits Tax 7.5% + Business Enterprise Tax 0.55%.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors. State-imposed limits on assessment increases. One-third of current and correct value for residential.

key_facts.recent_changes: HB 252 restructured income tax brackets in 2025 to 6 brackets (1.5%-5.9%). Gross Receipts Tax (not traditional sales tax) at 5.125% base.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County and city assessors. State Tax Commissioner provides oversight. True and full value assessment.

key_facts.recent_changes: HB 1158 collapsed from 5 brackets to 3. First $55,975 is tax-free. Lowest top rate (2.5%) of any income-tax state.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors. State Equalization Board provides oversight. Fair cash value assessment.

key_facts.recent_changes: HB 2764 will cut top rate to 4.5% and consolidate to 3 brackets in 2026 with trigger mechanism toward elimination.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County-administered. Assessment practices vary widely. Some counties use outdated base years. State oversight through State Tax Equalization Board.
notable_credits: Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit (state EITC, enacted Nov 2025)

key_facts.recent_changes: Corporate tax rate phasing from 9.99% to 4.99% by 2031 (currently 7.99%). Inheritance tax (0%-15% by relationship) still in effect. Flat income tax constitutionally required.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Municipal assessors. Among the highest effective property tax rates in the nation. Full and fair cash value assessment.

key_facts.recent_changes: PTET credit reduced to 90%. Decoupled from OBBBA tip/overtime exclusions. Clothing items under $250 exempt from sales tax.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors. Different assessment ratios: 4% for owner-occupied residential, 6% for other residential, 10.5% for commercial.

key_facts.recent_changes: Top rate cut from 6.2% to 6.0% for 2025. H.4216 proposes flat 3.99% for 2026 with path toward elimination. PTET at flat 3%.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County directors of equalization. State oversight through Department of Revenue. Full and true value assessment.

key_facts.recent_changes: Sales tax reduced from 4.5% to 4.2% (temporary through June 2027). Any new tax or rate increase requires 2/3 legislative vote or voter approval.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors. State Tax Commission provides oversight. Fair market value assessment. Truth-in-taxation process limits rate increases.
notable_credits: Taxpayer tax credit (nonrefundable, effectively creates 0% bracket)

key_facts.recent_changes: Rate cut from 4.55% to 4.5% via HB 106 (4th consecutive annual cut). SB 60 proposes 4.45% for 2026. PTET expires after TY 2025.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Municipal listers. State oversight through Property Valuation and Review. Fair market value. Statewide education property tax.

key_facts.recent_changes: Act 71 expanded EITC, extended Child Tax Credit to age 6, created Veteran Tax Credit, new 0.44% employer childcare payroll tax. One of only 5 income-tax states without PTET.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: Local commissioners of the revenue or assessors. State oversight through Department of Taxation. Fair market value assessment.

key_facts.recent_changes: Rolling conformity replaced with fixed date (Dec 31, 2025). PTET made permanent. EITC raised to 20%. Standard deduction permanently increased. Selective deconformity from OBBBA.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors. State Tax Commissioner provides oversight. Assessed at 60% of market value.

key_facts.recent_changes: Additional 2% rate cut in 2025 (SB 2033). Cumulative 20%+ reduction since 2023. Conformed to OBBBA. HB 3293 proposes corporate rate cut to 3.25% for 2026.

tax_structure.property_tax_admin: County assessors. State Department of Revenue provides oversight. Full market value assessment for minerals; 9.5% of fair market value for residential.

key_facts.recent_changes: Constitutional barrier effectively prohibits income tax. Ranks #1 on Tax Foundation State Tax Competitiveness Index. Revenue dependent on mineral severance and sales taxes.
